command: ssh an12 'cd /XYFS02/HDD_POOL/paratera_xy/pxy1289/HaocunYe/Research/newrepo && set -o pipefail; env CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=4 /HOME/paratera_xy/pxy1289/sa3_foundation_runtime/env/bin/python scripts/validate_gpu_placement.py --physical-gpu-id 4 | tee /HOME/paratera_xy/pxy1289/sa3_foundation_runtime/logs/gpu4-placement-script-final-20260719T133300Z.log'
justification: The 1.4B model requires one A800. The researcher's normal neighboring RL job occupied physical GPUs 0-3, while physical GPU 4 was idle; using the disjoint idle GPU preserves one-node TP1 replica-one placement without interfering with that job.

supersedes.scope: gpu_validation placement only; package and interpreter records remain unchanged
